value.content:
We're launching our new CLI tool today!

It's designed to make social media scheduling effortless for developers and AI agents. Built with TypeScript, supports 28+ platforms, and has a clean, intuitive API.

Features:
- Multi-platform posting
- Thread creation
- Scheduled posts
- Comments with media
- Provider-specific settings

Try it out and let us know what you think!

value.title: Launching Sharek CLI - Social Media Automation for Developers

value.content:
🚀 Launching Sharek CLI today!

Finally, a developer-friendly way to automate social media. Built with TypeScript, supports 28+ platforms.

✨ Features in thread below 👇

1️⃣ Multi-platform posting
Post to Twitter, LinkedIn, Reddit, TikTok, YouTube, and 23 more platforms with a single command

2️⃣ Thread creation
Easily create Twitter threads, each tweet with its own media

3️⃣ Provider-specific settings
Reddit subreddits, YouTube visibility, TikTok privacy - all configurable

Get started: https://github.com/yourrepo

Excited to announce the launch of Sharek CLI! 🎉

As developers, we know how time-consuming social media management can be. That's why we built a powerful CLI tool that makes scheduling posts across 28+ platforms effortless.

Key features:
• Multi-platform support (Twitter, LinkedIn, Reddit, TikTok, YouTube, and more)
• Thread and carousel creation
• Scheduled posting with precise timing
• Provider-specific settings and customization
• Built for AI agents and automation

Whether you're managing a personal brand, running marketing campaigns, or building AI-powered social media tools, Sharek CLI has you covered.

Check it out and let us know your thoughts!

🚀 New launch alert!

Sharek CLI is here - automate your social media like a pro.

✨ 28+ platforms
📅 Scheduled posting
🧵 Thread creation
⚙️ Full customization

Link in bio! #developer #automation #socialmedia #tech
